409	    # ══════════════════════════════════════════
410	    # PLANNING
411	    # ══════════════════════════════════════════
412	
413	    def create_plan(self) -> bool:
414	        """Create the execution plan via Claude Code."""
415	        self._legacy_logger.plan_start()
416	
417	        plan = self.planner.create_plan()
418	        if plan is None:
419	            return False
420	
421	        phase_details = [
422	            {
423	                "phase": p.id,
424	                "name": p.name,
425	                "description": p.description,
426	                "taskCount": len(p.tasks),
427	                "tasks": [{"id": t.id, "name": t.name, "description": t.description} for t in p.tasks],
428	            }
429	            for p in plan.phases
430	        ]
431	        self._legacy_logger.plan_done(len(plan.phases), plan.total_tasks, phase_details)
432	        return True
433	
434	    # ══════════════════════════════════════════
435	    # PLAN EXECUTION
436	    # ══════════════════════════════════════════
437	
438	    def execute_plan(self) -> bool:
439	        """Execute all tasks in the plan sequentially."""
440	        plan_path = self.dirigent_dir / "PLAN.json"
441	        plan = Plan.load(plan_path)
442	        if not plan:
443	            if plan_path.exists():
444	                logger.error("PLAN.json exists but failed validation — check logs above for details")
445	            else:
446	                logger.error("No PLAN.json found at %s", plan_path)
447	            return False
448	
449	        state = self._load_or_init_state()
450	
451	        total_phases = len(plan.phases)
452	        total_tasks = plan.total_tasks
453	
454	        # Interactive mode check
455	        from outbid_dirigent.dirigent import get_questioner, get_execution_mode
456	        questioner = get_questioner()
457	        execution_mode = get_execution_mode()
458	
459	        if execution_mode == "interactive" and questioner and questioner.is_active():
460	            result = questioner.ask(
461	                question=f"Der Plan enthält {total_phases} Phasen mit {total_tasks} Tasks. Soll die Ausführung gestartet werden?",
462	                options=["Ja, starten", "Nein, abbrechen"],
463	                context=f"Geschätzte Zeit: {total_tasks * 5} Minuten.",
464	                phase=0,
465	            )
466	            if result.answered and result.answer and ("abbrechen" in result.answer.lower() or "nein" in result.answer.lower()):
467	                logger.info("Execution cancelled by user")
468	                return False
469	        else:
470	            self._legacy_logger.info(f"Starte Ausführung: {total_phases} Phasen, {total_tasks} Tasks")
471	
472	        for phase in plan.phases:
473	            if phase.id in state.get("completed_phases", []):
474	                logger.info(f"Phase {phase.id} already completed, skipping")
475	                continue
476	
477	            contract_ok = self._create_phase_contract(phase, plan)
478	            if contract_ok:
479	                logger.info(f"Phase {phase.id} contract created")
480	            else:
481	                logger.warning(f"Phase {phase.id} contract creation failed (non-blocking)")
482	
483	            self._legacy_logger.phase_start(phase.id, phase.name, len(phase.tasks))
484	
485	            phase_deviation_count = 0
486	            phase_commit_count = 0
487	            phase_tasks_completed = 0
488	
489	            for task in phase.tasks:
490	                if task.id in state.get("completed_tasks", []):
491	                    logger.info(f"Task {task.id} already completed, skipping")
492	                    phase_tasks_completed += 1
493	                    continue
494	
495	                self._legacy_logger.task_start(task.id, task.name, phase=int(phase.id))
496	
497	                result = self.runner.run_task(task, plan, phase_num=phase.id)
498	
499	                if result.success:
500	                    state["completed_tasks"].append(task.id)
501	                    save_state(str(self.repo_path), state, dirigent_dir=self.dirigent_dir)
502	                    phase_tasks_completed += 1
503	                    phase_deviation_count += len(result.deviations)
504	                    if result.commit_hash:
505	                        phase_commit_count += 1
506	                    for dev in result.deviations:
507	                        self._legacy_logger.deviation(dev["type"], dev["description"], task_id=task.id, phase=int(phase.id))
508	                    self._legacy_logger.task_done(task.id, result.commit_hash, task_name=task.name, phase=int(phase.id))
509	                else:
510	                    state.setdefault("failed_tasks", []).append({
511	                        "task_id": task.id,
512	                        "error": result.summary,
513	                        "attempts": result.attempts,
514	                    })
515	                    save_state(str(self.repo_path), state, dirigent_dir=self.dirigent_dir)
516	                    logger.error(f"Task {task.id} failed after {result.attempts} attempts")
517	                    self._legacy_logger.stop(f"Task {task.id} fehlgeschlagen nach {result.attempts} Versuchen")
518	                    self._legacy_logger.run_complete(success=False)
519	                    return False
520	
521	            review_passed = self._review_phase(phase, plan)
522	            if not review_passed:
523	                state.setdefault("failed_phases", []).append({"phase_id": phase.id, "reason": "review_failed"})
524	                save_state(str(self.repo_path), state, dirigent_dir=self.dirigent_dir)
525	                if self.force_continue:
526	                    logger.warning(f"Phase {phase.id} review failed — continuing anyway (--force-continue)")
527	                else:
528	                    logger.error(f"Phase {phase.id} review failed — halting execution. Fix issues and --resume to retry.")
529	                    self._legacy_logger.stop(f"Phase {phase.id} review failed")
530	                    self._legacy_logger.run_complete(success=False)
531	                    return False
532	
533	            state.setdefault("completed_phases", []).append(phase.id)
534	            save_state(str(self.repo_path), state, dirigent_dir=self.dirigent_dir)
535	            self._legacy_logger.phase_complete(phase.id, phase.name, phase_tasks_completed, phase_deviation_count, phase_commit_count)
536	
537	        # NOTE: run_complete() is called by finalize() after shipping, not here
538	        return True
539	
540	    def finalize(self, success: bool = True):
541	        """Send the final 'complete' event after all steps (entropy, tests, ship) are done."""
542	        self._legacy_logger.run_complete(success=success)
543	
544	    def _load_or_init_state(self) -> dict:
545	        state = load_state(str(self.repo_path), dirigent_dir=self.dirigent_dir)
546	        if not state:
547	            state = {
548	                "started_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
549	                "completed_phases": [],
550	                "completed_tasks": [],
551	            }
552	        else:
553	            state.setdefault("completed_phases", [])
554	            state.setdefault("completed_tasks", [])
555	        save_state(str(self.repo_path), state, dirigent_dir=self.dirigent_dir)
556	        return state
557	
558	    # ══════════════════════════════════════════
559	    # CONTRACT + PHASE REVIEW (review/fix loop)
560	    # ══════════════════════════════════════════
561	
562	    def _create_phase_contract(self, phase, plan: Plan) -> bool:
563	        """Create acceptance criteria contract before a phase begins."""
564	        return self.contract_manager.create_contract(phase, plan, self.spec_content)
565	
566	    def _review_phase(self, phase, plan: Plan) -> bool:
567	        """Run the contract-based review/fix iteration loop.
568	
569	        Flow:
570	        1. Reviewer reviews changes against the phase contract → PASS/FAIL
571	        2. If FAIL: Executor fixes the findings (reviewer never fixes directly)
572	        3. Re-review until PASS or max iterations reached
573	
574	        Returns True if passed, False if failed. Failure blocks execution.
575	        """
576	        commit_count = len(phase.tasks)
577	        if commit_count == 0:
578	            return True
579	
580	        logger.info(f"Phase {phase.id} review: contract-based review/fix loop")
581	        passed = self.contract_manager.review_fix_loop(phase, plan)
582	
583	        # Log progress after review
584	        self.log_progress("text")
585	
586	        review = Review.load(self.dirigent_dir / "reviews" / f"phase-{phase.id}.json")
587	
588	        if passed and review:
589	            logger.info(
590	                f"Phase {phase.id} review: {review.verdict.value.upper()} "
591	                f"({review.critical_count} critical, {review.warn_count} warnings, "
592	                f"{len(review.criteria_results)} criteria evaluated)"
593	            )
594	        elif passed:
595	            logger.info(f"Phase {phase.id} review: no structured review created")
596	        else:
597	            logger.error(f"Phase {phase.id} review FAILED — blocking execution")
598	            if review:
599	                for cr in review.failed_criteria:
600	                    logger.error(f"  FAIL [{cr.ac_id}]: {cr.notes[:200]}")
601	
602	        return passed
603	
604	    # ══════════════════════════════════════════
605	    # TEST STEP
606	    # ══════════════════════════════════════════
607	
608	    def run_tests(self) -> bool:
609	        """Run build and test commands from the test harness. Returns True if passed or no harness."""
610	        harness = TestHarness.load(self.dirigent_dir / "test-harness.json")
611	        if not harness or not harness.commands:
612	            logger.info("No test harness or commands, skipping test step")
613	            return True
614	
615	        all_passed = True
616	
617	        # Run build, test, and e2e commands in order
618	        for key in ("build", "test", "e2e"):
619	            if key in harness.commands:
620	                cmd = harness.commands[key]
621	                logger.info(f"Running {key}: {cmd.command}")
622	                timeout = 600 if key == "e2e" else 120
623	                if not self._run_verification_cmd(cmd.command, key, timeout=timeout):
624	                    all_passed = False
625	
626	        logger.info("All verification commands passed") if all_passed else logger.error("Verification failed — blocking ship")
627	
628	        # Notify portal that testing is complete
629	        from outbid_dirigent.dirigent import get_portal_reporter
630	        reporter = get_portal_reporter()
631	        if reporter and hasattr(reporter, "testing_complete"):
632	            reporter.testing_complete(str(self.repo_path))
633	
634	        return all_passed
635	
636	    def _run_verification_cmd(self, command: str, name: str, timeout: int = 120) -> bool:
637	        """Run a single bash verification command. Returns True on success."""
638	        try:
639	            result = subprocess.run(
640	                ["bash", "-c", command],
641	                cwd=self.repo_path, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=timeout,
642	            )
643	            if result.returncode == 0:
644	                logger.info(f"  PASS: {name}")
645	                return True
646	            logger.error(f"  FAIL: {name} (exit {result.returncode})")
647	            if result.stderr:
648	                logger.error(f"    stderr: {result.stderr[:200]}")
649	            return False
650	        except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
651	            logger.error(f"  TIMEOUT: {name}")
652	            return False
653	        except Exception as e:
654	            logger.error(f"  ERROR: {name}: {e}")
655	            return False
656	
657	    # ══════════════════════════════════════════
658	    # SHIPPING
659	    # ══════════════════════════════════════════
660	
661	    def ship(self) -> bool:
662	        """Create branch, push, and open PR."""
663	        plan = Plan.load(self.dirigent_dir / "PLAN.json")
664	        self._legacy_logger.ship_start("dirigent/...")
665	
666	        shipper = Shipper(self.repo_path, plan, self.dry_run, dirigent_dir=self.dirigent_dir)
667	        success = shipper.ship()
668	
669	        self.shipped_branch_name = shipper.branch_name
670	        self.shipped_pr_url = shipper.pr_url
671	
672	        if shipper.pr_url:
673	            self._legacy_logger.ship_done(shipper.pr_url)
674	        elif shipper.branch_name:
675	            self._legacy_logger.ship_pushed(shipper.branch_name)
676	        return success

678	    # ══════════════════════════════════════════
679	    # SUMMARY GENERATION
680	    # ══════════════════════════════════════════
681	
682	    def generate_summary(self, branch_name: Optional[str] = None, pr_url: Optional[str] = None) -> dict:
683	        """Generate the final execution report."""
684	        logger.info("Generating summary...")
685	
686	        plan = Plan.load(self.dirigent_dir / "PLAN.json")
687	        plan_title = plan.title if plan else "Feature"
688	
689	        summaries = [f.read_text(encoding="utf-8") for f in sorted(self.summaries_dir.glob("*-SUMMARY.md"))] if self.summaries_dir.exists() else []
690	        decisions = self.oracle.get_all_decisions()
691	        files_changed = self._get_files_changed()
692	        deviations = self._collect_all_deviations(summaries)
693	
694	        cost_totals = self._legacy_logger.get_cost_totals()
695	
696	        if not branch_name:
697	            branch_name = self.shipped_branch_name or self._get_current_branch()
698	        if not pr_url:
699	            pr_url = self.shipped_pr_url
700	
701	        # Extract test instructions and manual hints for the summary
702	        test_instructions = self._extract_test_instructions()
703	        manual_hints = self._generate_manual_test_hints(files_changed)
704	
705	        markdown = self._generate_summary_markdown(
706	            plan_title, plan, summaries, decisions, files_changed, deviations, cost_totals
707	        )
708	
709	        # NOTE: We no longer call _legacy_logger.summary() here because:
710	        # 1. It sends a summary event with cost_totals from legacy logger (which doesn't track transcripts)
711	        # 2. _send_summary_to_portal() collects token usage directly from Claude Code transcripts
712	        # 3. The daemon would forward the legacy event first, causing the portal to reject our accurate one
713	
714	        self._send_summary_to_portal(
715	            markdown, files_changed, decisions, deviations, branch_name, pr_url,
716	            test_instructions, manual_hints
717	        )
718	
719	        return {"markdown": markdown, "files_changed": files_changed, "decisions": decisions,
720	                "deviations": deviations, "cost_totals": cost_totals, "branch_name": branch_name, "pr_url": pr_url}
721	
722	    # ── Summary helpers ──
723	
724	    def _get_current_branch(self) -> Optional[str]:
725	        try:
726	            result = subprocess.run(
727	                ["git", "rev-parse", "--abbrev-ref", "HEAD"],
728	                cwd=self.repo_path, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10,
729	            )
730	            return result.stdout.strip() if result.returncode == 0 else None
731	        except Exception:
732	            return None
733	
734	    def _get_files_changed(self) -> list[dict]:
735	        """Get files changed during this execution only.
736	
737	        Uses the state's started_at timestamp to find the first commit
738	        of this execution, then diffs from there to HEAD.
739	        """
740	        try:
741	            # Load state to get execution start time
742	            state = load_state(str(self.repo_path), dirigent_dir=self.dirigent_dir)
743	            started_at = state.get("started_at") if state else None
744	
745	            if started_at:
746	                # Find commits made after the execution started
747	                # Use --since to get only commits from this execution
748	                result = subprocess.run(
749	                    ["git", "log", "--since", started_at, "--format=%H", "--reverse"],
750	                    cwd=self.repo_path, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30,
751	                )
752	                commits = [c.strip() for c in result.stdout.strip().split("\n") if c.strip()]
753	
754	                if commits:
755	                    # Get the first commit of this execution
756	                    first_commit = commits[0]
757	                    # Diff from parent of first commit to HEAD
758	                    diff_cmd = ["git", "diff", "--numstat", f"{first_commit}^..HEAD"]
759	                else:
760	                    # No commits in this execution
761	                    return []
762	            else:
763	                # Fallback: use completed_tasks count as proxy for commit count
764	                completed_tasks = len(state.get("completed_tasks", [])) if state else 0
765	                commit_count = max(1, completed_tasks + 2)  # +2 for review commits
766	                diff_cmd = ["git", "diff", "--numstat", f"HEAD~{commit_count}..HEAD"]
767	
768	            result = subprocess.run(
769	                diff_cmd,
770	                cwd=self.repo_path, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30,
771	            )
772	            files = []
773	            for line in result.stdout.strip().split("\n"):
774	                parts = line.split("\t") if line else []
775	                if len(parts) == 3:
776	                    files.append({
777	                        "path": parts[2],
778	                        "lines_added": int(parts[0]) if parts[0] != '-' else 0,
779	                        "lines_removed": int(parts[1]) if parts[1] != '-' else 0,
780	                    })
781	            return files
782	        except Exception as e:
783	            logger.debug(f"Error getting files changed: {e}")
784	            return []
785	
786	    def _collect_all_deviations(self, summaries: list[str]) -> list[dict]:
787	        all_devs = []
788	        for s in summaries:
789	            all_devs.extend(TaskRunner._extract_deviations(s))
790	        return all_devs
791	
792	    def _generate_summary_markdown(
793	        self, title: str, plan: Optional[Plan], summaries: list[str],
794	        decisions: list[dict], files: list[dict], deviations: list[dict], cost_totals: dict,
795	    ) -> str:
796	        phases_count = len(plan.phases) if plan else 0
797	        tasks_count = plan.total_tasks if plan else 0
798	        cost_usd = cost_totals["total_cost_cents"] / 100
799	
800	        md = [f"# Abschlussprotokoll: {title}\n"]
801	        md.append(f"**Datum:** {datetime.now().strftime('%d.%m.%Y %H:%M')}\n")
802	        md.append("## Übersicht\n")
803	        md.append(f"- **Phasen:** {phases_count}")
804	        md.append(f"- **Tasks:** {tasks_count}")
805	        md.append(f"- **Dateien geändert:** {len(files)}")
806	        md.append(f"- **Deviations:** {len(deviations)}")
807	        md.append(f"- **Oracle-Entscheidungen:** {len(decisions)}")
808	        md.append(f"- **API-Kosten:** ${cost_usd:.2f}")
809	        md.append(f"- **Tokens:** {cost_totals['total_input_tokens']:,} in / {cost_totals['total_output_tokens']:,} out\n")
810	
811	        # Test instructions from spec acceptance criteria
812	        test_instructions = self._extract_test_instructions()
813	        if test_instructions:
814	            md.append("## Test-Anleitung\n")
815	            md.append("So kannst du die Änderungen testen:\n")
816	            for i, step in enumerate(test_instructions, 1):
817	                md.append(f"{i}. {step}")
818	            md.append("")
819	
820	        # Manual testing hints based on file changes
821	        manual_steps = self._generate_manual_test_hints(files)
822	        if manual_steps:
823	            md.append("## Manuell zu prüfen\n")
824	            md.append("Diese Punkte sollten manuell verifiziert werden:\n")
825	            for step in manual_steps:
826	                md.append(f"- {step}")
827	            md.append("")
828	
829	        if files:
830	            md.append("## Geänderte Dateien\n")
831	            for f in files[:30]:
832	                md.append(f"- `{f['path']}` (+{f['lines_added']}/-{f['lines_removed']})")
833	            if len(files) > 30:
834	                md.append(f"- ... und {len(files) - 30} weitere")
835	            md.append("")
836	
837	        if decisions:
838	            md.append("## Oracle-Entscheidungen\n")
839	            for d in decisions[:15]:
840	                q = d['question'][:100] + "..." if len(d['question']) > 100 else d['question']
841	                md.append(f"**Q:** {q}\n**A:** {d['decision']}\n*{d['reason']}*\n")
842	
843	        if deviations:
844	            md.append("## Deviations\n")
845	            for dev in deviations:
846	                md.append(f"- **{dev['type']}:** {dev['description']}")
847	            md.append("")
848	
849	        if summaries:
850	            md.append("## Task-Details\n")
851	            for i, s in enumerate(summaries[:10], 1):
852	                lines = s.strip().split("\n")
853	                md.append(f"### {lines[0] if lines else f'Task {i}'}")
854	                match = re.search(r"## Was wurde gemacht\n(.+?)(?=\n##|\Z)", s, re.DOTALL)
855	                if match:
856	                    md.append(match.group(1).strip()[:300])
857	                md.append("")
858	
859	        return "\n".join(md)
860	
861	    def _extract_test_instructions(self) -> list[str]:
862	        """Extract test instructions from spec acceptance criteria."""
863	        spec_file = self.dirigent_dir / "SPEC.md"
864	        if not spec_file.exists():
865	            spec_file = self.repo_path / ".planning" / "SPEC.md"
866	        if not spec_file.exists():
867	            return []
868	
869	        try:
870	            content = spec_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
871	            # Find acceptance criteria section
872	            ac_match = re.search(
873	                r"##\s*(?:Acceptance Criteria|Akzeptanzkriterien|AC)\s*\n(.*?)(?=\n##|\Z)",
874	                content, re.DOTALL | re.IGNORECASE
875	            )
876	            if not ac_match:
877	                return []
878	
879	            ac_section = ac_match.group(1).strip()
880	            # Extract bullet points
881	            criteria = re.findall(r"[-*]\s*(.+?)(?=\n[-*]|\Z)", ac_section, re.DOTALL)
882	            # Convert to test steps
883	            test_steps = []
884	            for criterion in criteria[:8]:  # Max 8 steps
885	                step = criterion.strip().replace("\n", " ")
886	                # Make it actionable
887	                if not step.lower().startswith(("verify", "check", "test", "prüfe", "teste")):
888	                    step = f"Verifiziere: {step}"
889	                test_steps.append(step)
890	            return test_steps
891	        except Exception:
892	            return []
893	
894	    def _generate_manual_test_hints(self, files: list[dict]) -> list[str]:
895	        """Generate manual testing hints based on changed files."""
896	        hints = []
897	
898	        # Categorize files
899	        ui_files = [f for f in files if any(x in f["path"].lower() for x in
900	            ["component", "page", "view", ".tsx", ".jsx", ".vue", ".svelte", "template"])]
901	        api_files = [f for f in files if any(x in f["path"].lower() for x in
902	            ["api/", "route", "endpoint", "controller", "handler"])]
903	        test_files = [f for f in files if any(x in f["path"].lower() for x in
904	            ["test", "spec", ".test.", ".spec."])]
905	        migration_files = [f for f in files if any(x in f["path"].lower() for x in
906	            ["migration", "schema", ".sql"])]
907	        config_files = [f for f in files if any(x in f["path"].lower() for x in
908	            ["config", ".env", "settings", "package.json", "requirements"])]
909	
910	        if ui_files:
911	            hints.append(f"UI-Änderungen in {len(ui_files)} Dateien - Browser öffnen und visuell prüfen")
912	
913	        if api_files:
914	            hints.append(f"API-Änderungen in {len(api_files)} Dateien - API-Endpunkte mit Postman/curl testen")
915	
916	        if not test_files and (ui_files or api_files):
917	            hints.append("Keine Tests hinzugefügt - manuelle Tests empfohlen")
918	
919	        if migration_files:
920	            hints.append("Datenbank-Migrationen geändert - auf staging deployen und prüfen")
921	
922	        if config_files:
923	            hints.append("Konfigurationsdateien geändert - Umgebungsvariablen prüfen")
924	
925	        # Check for new dependencies
926	        for f in files:
927	            if "package.json" in f["path"] and f["lines_added"] > 0:
928	                hints.append("`npm install` ausführen (neue Dependencies)")
929	                break
930	            if "requirements" in f["path"] and f["lines_added"] > 0:
931	                hints.append("`pip install -r requirements.txt` ausführen (neue Dependencies)")
932	                break
933	
934	        return hints[:6]  # Max 6 hints

936	    def _collect_token_usage(self) -> dict:
937	        """Read token usage directly from Claude Code transcript files.
938	
939	        Claude Code stores session transcripts in ~/.claude/projects/<project-key>/*.jsonl
940	        Each assistant message contains usage data that we sum up.
941	
942	        Only counts transcripts created after the execution started (from state.started_at)
943	        to avoid counting tokens from previous executions on the same workspace.
944	
945	        Returns dict with:
946	            - input_tokens: total input (including cache)
947	            - output_tokens: total output
948	            - cache_creation_tokens: tokens written to cache
949	            - cache_read_tokens: tokens read from cache (discounted)
950	            - cost_cents: calculated cost in cents based on model pricing
951	            - usage_by_model: breakdown by model
952	        """
953	        total_input = 0
954	        total_output = 0
955	        total_cache_creation = 0
956	        total_cache_read = 0
957	        total_cost_cents = 0.0
958	        files_processed = 0
959	        files_skipped = 0
960	        usage_by_model: dict[str, dict] = {}  # model -> {input, output, cache_read, cache_write, cost}
961	
962	        # Get execution start time from state
963	        state = load_state(str(self.repo_path), dirigent_dir=self.dirigent_dir)
964	        started_at_str = state.get("started_at") if state else None
965	        started_at_ts = None
966	        if started_at_str:
967	            try:
968	                started_at_ts = datetime.fromisoformat(started_at_str).timestamp()
969	            except (ValueError, TypeError):
970	                pass
971	
972	        # Find Claude projects directory
973	        claude_projects_dir = Path.home() / ".claude" / "projects"
974	        if not claude_projects_dir.exists():
975	            logger.warning(f"Claude projects directory not found: {claude_projects_dir}")
976	            return {"input_tokens": 0, "output_tokens": 0, "cache_creation_tokens": 0, "cache_read_tokens": 0, "cost_cents": 0, "usage_by_model": {}}
977	
978	        # Build project key pattern from repo path (Claude uses path with dashes)
979	        # e.g., /home/coder/outbit-portal -> -home-coder-outbit-portal
980	        repo_path_str = str(self.repo_path.resolve())
981	        project_key = repo_path_str.replace("/", "-")
982	        if not project_key.startswith("-"):
983	            project_key = "-" + project_key
984	
985	        # Find matching project directories
986	        matching_dirs = []
987	        for d in claude_projects_dir.iterdir():
988	            if d.is_dir() and project_key in d.name:
989	                matching_dirs.append(d)
990	
991	        if not matching_dirs:
992	            # Try without leading dash
993	            project_key_alt = project_key.lstrip("-")
994	            for d in claude_projects_dir.iterdir():
995	                if d.is_dir() and project_key_alt in d.name:
996	                    matching_dirs.append(d)
997	
998	        if not matching_dirs:
999	            logger.warning(f"No Claude project directory found matching: {project_key}")
1000	            logger.debug(f"Available directories: {[d.name for d in claude_projects_dir.iterdir() if d.is_dir()]}")
1001	            return {"input_tokens": 0, "output_tokens": 0, "cache_creation_tokens": 0, "cache_read_tokens": 0, "cost_cents": 0, "usage_by_model": {}}
1002	
1003	        logger.info(f"Found {len(matching_dirs)} Claude project directories matching repo")
1004	
1005	        # Read JSONL transcript files (only entries created after execution started)
1006	        for project_dir in matching_dirs:
1007	            for transcript_file in project_dir.glob("*.jsonl"):
1008	                try:
1009	                    # Skip files that haven't been modified since execution started
1010	                    # (optimization to avoid reading old files entirely)
1011	                    if started_at_ts:
1012	                        file_mtime = transcript_file.stat().st_mtime
1013	                        if file_mtime < started_at_ts:
1014	                            files_skipped += 1
1015	                            continue
1016	
1017	                    with open(transcript_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
1018	                        for line in f:
1019	                            line = line.strip()
1020	                            if not line:
1021	                                continue
1022	                            try:
1023	                                entry = json.loads(line)
1024	
1025	                                # Filter by entry timestamp (not just file mtime)
1026	                                # Each entry has a 'timestamp' field like "2025-03-27T13:11:52.636Z"
1027	                                if started_at_ts and "timestamp" in entry:
1028	                                    try:
1029	                                        entry_ts_str = entry["timestamp"]
1030	                                        # Parse ISO timestamp (handle both with and without Z suffix)
1031	                                        if entry_ts_str.endswith("Z"):
1032	                                            entry_ts_str = entry_ts_str[:-1] + "+00:00"
1033	                                        entry_ts = datetime.fromisoformat(entry_ts_str).timestamp()
1034	                                        if entry_ts < started_at_ts:
1035	                                            continue  # Skip entries from before this execution
1036	                                    except (ValueError, TypeError):
1037	                                        pass  # If we can't parse, include the entry
1038	
1039	                                # Look for assistant messages with usage data
1040	                                if entry.get("type") == "assistant" and "message" in entry:
1041	                                    message = entry["message"]
1042	                                    usage = message.get("usage", {})
1043	                                    model = message.get("model", "unknown")
1044	
1045	                                    if usage:
1046	                                        input_tokens = usage.get("input_tokens", 0)
1047	                                        output_tokens = usage.get("output_tokens", 0)
1048	                                        cache_creation = usage.get("cache_creation_input_tokens", 0)
1049	                                        cache_read = usage.get("cache_read_input_tokens", 0)
1050	
1051	                                        # Accumulate totals
1052	                                        total_input += input_tokens
1053	                                        total_output += output_tokens
1054	                                        total_cache_creation += cache_creation
1055	                                        total_cache_read += cache_read
1056	
1057	                                        # Calculate cost for this message
1058	                                        input_price, output_price = _get_model_pricing(model)
1059	
1060	                                        # Cost calculation:
1061	                                        # - Regular input: full price
1062	                                        # - Cache writes: 1.25x input price
1063	                                        # - Cache reads: 0.1x input price
1064	                                        # - Output: full output price
1065	                                        input_cost = (input_tokens / 1_000_000) * input_price
1066	                                        cache_write_cost = (cache_creation / 1_000_000) * input_price * 1.25
1067	                                        cache_read_cost = (cache_read / 1_000_000) * input_price * 0.1
1068	                                        output_cost = (output_tokens / 1_000_000) * output_price
1069	
1070	                                        message_cost = input_cost + cache_write_cost + cache_read_cost + output_cost
1071	                                        total_cost_cents += message_cost * 100  # Convert to cents
1072	
1073	                                        # Track by model
1074	                                        if model not in usage_by_model:
1075	                                            usage_by_model[model] = {
1076	                                                "input_tokens": 0,
1077	                                                "output_tokens": 0,
1078	                                                "cache_read_tokens": 0,
1079	                                                "cache_write_tokens": 0,
1080	                                                "cost_cents": 0.0,
1081	                                            }
1082	                                        usage_by_model[model]["input_tokens"] += input_tokens
1083	                                        usage_by_model[model]["output_tokens"] += output_tokens
1084	                                        usage_by_model[model]["cache_read_tokens"] += cache_read
1085	                                        usage_by_model[model]["cache_write_tokens"] += cache_creation
1086	                                        usage_by_model[model]["cost_cents"] += message_cost * 100
1087	                            except json.JSONDecodeError:
1088	                                continue
1089	                    files_processed += 1
1090	                except Exception as e:
1091	                    logger.debug(f"Error reading transcript {transcript_file}: {e}")
1092	                    continue
1093	
1094	        total_in = total_input + total_cache_creation + total_cache_read
1095	        cost_usd = total_cost_cents / 100
1096	
1097	        logger.info(f"Collected token usage from {files_processed} transcript files "
1098	                   f"(skipped {files_skipped} older files): "
1099	                   f"{total_in:,} input (raw: {total_input:,}, cache_create: {total_cache_creation:,}, cache_read: {total_cache_read:,}), "
1100	                   f"{total_output:,} output, ${cost_usd:.4f} estimated cost")
1101	
1102	        # Log breakdown by model if multiple models used
1103	        if len(usage_by_model) > 1:
1104	            for model, stats in sorted(usage_by_model.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]["cost_cents"]):
1105	                logger.debug(f"  {model}: {stats['input_tokens']:,} in, {stats['output_tokens']:,} out, "
1106	                           f"${stats['cost_cents']/100:.4f}")
1107	
1108	        return {
1109	            "input_tokens": total_input + total_cache_creation + total_cache_read,
1110	            "output_tokens": total_output,
1111	            "cache_creation_tokens": total_cache_creation,
1112	            "cache_read_tokens": total_cache_read,
1113	            "cost_cents": int(round(total_cost_cents)),
1114	            "usage_by_model": usage_by_model,
1115	        }
1116	
1117	    def _send_summary_to_portal(
1118	        self, markdown: str, files_changed: list[dict],
1119	        decisions: list[dict], deviations: list[dict],
1120	        branch_name: Optional[str], pr_url: Optional[str],
1121	        test_instructions: Optional[list[str]] = None, manual_hints: Optional[list[str]] = None,
1122	    ):
1123	        # Use direct credentials from Executor, fallback to questioner
1124	        portal_url = self.portal_url
1125	        execution_id = self.execution_id
1126	        reporter_token = self.reporter_token
1127	
1128	        if not portal_url or not execution_id:
1129	            # Try questioner as fallback
1130	            from outbid_dirigent.dirigent import get_questioner
1131	            questioner = get_questioner()

1133	                portal_url = questioner.portal_url

1136	
1137	        if not portal_url or not execution_id or not reporter_token:
1138	            logger.debug("No portal credentials available, skipping summary upload")
1139	            return
1140	
1141	        # Collect token usage directly from Claude Code transcripts
1142	        token_usage = self._collect_token_usage()
1143	        cost_cents = token_usage.get("cost_cents", 0)
1144	        logger.info(f"Token usage collected: {token_usage['input_tokens']:,} input, "
1145	                   f"{token_usage['output_tokens']:,} output, ${cost_cents/100:.4f} cost")
1146	
1147	        # Calculate duration
1148	        elapsed_ms = 0
1149	        if self._legacy_logger._start_time:
1150	            elapsed = datetime.now() - self._legacy_logger._start_time
1151	            elapsed_ms = int(elapsed.total_seconds() * 1000)
1152	
1153	        # Build summary payload
1154	        summary_data = {
1155	            "markdown": markdown,
1156	            "filesChanged": files_changed,
1157	            "decisions": [
1158	                {"question": d["question"][:200], "decision": d["decision"], "reason": d["reason"]}
1159	                for d in decisions
1160	            ] if decisions else [],
1161	            "deviations": deviations or [],
1162	            "branchName": branch_name,
1163	            "prUrl": pr_url,
1164	            "totalCommits": self._legacy_logger._total_commits,
1165	            "durationMs": elapsed_ms,
1166	            "testInstructions": test_instructions or [],
1167	            "manualHints": manual_hints or [],
1168	            # Token usage from Claude Code sessions
1169	            "totalInputTokens": token_usage["input_tokens"],
1170	            "totalOutputTokens": token_usage["output_tokens"],
1171	            "totalCostCents": token_usage.get("cost_cents", 0),
1172	        }
1173	
1174	        try:
1175	            logger.info(f"Sending summary to portal: {portal_url}/api/execution-event")
1176	            response = requests.post(
1177	                f"{portal_url}/api/execution-event",
1178	                headers={
1179	                    "Content-Type": "application/json",
1180	                    "X-Reporter-Token": reporter_token,
1181	                },
1182	                json={
1183	                    "execution_id": execution_id,
1184	                    "event": {
1185	                        "type": "summary",
1186	                        "ts": time.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", time.gmtime()),
1187	                        "data": summary_data,
1188	                    }
1189	                },
1190	                timeout=30,
1191	            )
1192	            if response.ok:
1193	                logger.info(f"Summary sent successfully: {len(files_changed)} files, "
1194	                          f"{token_usage['input_tokens']:,} input tokens, ${cost_cents/100:.4f}")
1195	            else:
1196	                logger.warning(f"Summary upload failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text[:200]}")
1197	        except requests.RequestException as e:
1198	            logger.error(f"Summary upload failed: {e}")
1199

1204	    def generate_preview_script(self) -> bool:

1206	        logger.info("Generating preview script...")

1209	    def _generate_preview_from_runtime(self) -> bool:
1210	        """Fallback: generate preview script from RuntimeAnalysis."""
1211	        analysis = load_analysis(str(self.repo_path))
1212	        if not analysis or "runtime" not in analysis:
1213	            logger.warning("No manifest or runtime analysis found, skipping preview script")
1214	            return False
1215	
1216	        runtime = analysis["runtime"]
1217	        project_name = analysis.get("repo_name", "project")
1218	        services = runtime.get("services", [])
1219	        start_command = runtime.get("start_command", "npm run dev")
1220	        uses_doppler = runtime.get("uses_doppler", False)
1221	
1222	        script_lines = [
1223	            "#!/bin/bash",
1224	            "# Preview Start Script - Generated by Outbid Dirigent (from runtime analysis)",
1225	            "",
1226	            "set -e",
1227	            "",
1228	            'DOPPLER_TOKEN="${1:-$DOPPLER_TOKEN}"',
1229	            "",
1230	        ]
1231	
1232	        if services:
1233	            script_lines.append("# ─── Start Required Services ───")
1234	            script_lines.append("")
1235	            for service in services:
1236	                name = service.get("name", "service")
1237	                docker_image = service.get("docker_image")
1238	                port = service.get("port")
1239	                env_vars = service.get("env_vars", [])
1240	                if docker_image:
1241	                    container_name = name.lower().replace(" ", "_")
1242	                    script_lines.append(f"# {name}")
1243	                    script_lines.append(f'if ! docker ps --format "{{{{.Names}}}}" | grep -q "^{container_name}$"; then')
1244	                    docker_cmd = f"  docker run -d --name {container_name}"
1245	                    for env_var in env_vars:
1246	                        docker_cmd += f' -e "{env_var}"'
1247	                    if port:
1248	                        docker_cmd += f" -p {port}:{port}"
1249	                    docker_cmd += f" {docker_image}"
1250	                    script_lines.append(docker_cmd)
1251	                    script_lines.append("else")
1252	                    script_lines.append(f'  echo "{name} already running"')
1253	                    script_lines.append("fi")
1254	                    script_lines.append("")
1255	            script_lines.append("sleep 3")
1256	            script_lines.append("")
1257	
1258	        script_lines.append(f"cd ~/{project_name}")
1259	        script_lines.append("")
1260	
1261	        setup_steps = runtime.get("setup_steps", [])
1262	        if setup_steps:
1263	            script_lines.append('if [ ! -f ".setup_done" ]; then')
1264	            for step in setup_steps:
1265	                script_lines.append(f"  {step}")
1266	            script_lines.append('  touch ".setup_done"')
1267	            script_lines.append("fi")
1268	            script_lines.append("")
1269	
1270	        if uses_doppler:
1271	            script_lines.append('if [ -n "$DOPPLER_TOKEN" ]; then')
1272	            script_lines.append(f'  exec doppler run --token "$DOPPLER_TOKEN" -- {start_command}')
1273	            script_lines.append("else")
1274	            script_lines.append(f"  exec {start_command}")
1275	            script_lines.append("fi")
1276	        else:
1277	            script_lines.append('if [ -n "$DOPPLER_TOKEN" ]; then')
1278	            script_lines.append(f'  exec doppler run --token "$DOPPLER_TOKEN" -- {start_command}')
1279	            script_lines.append("else")
1280	            script_lines.append(f"  exec {start_command}")
1281	            script_lines.append("fi")
1282	
1283	        return self._write_preview_script(
1284	            script_lines, runtime.get("port", 3000), runtime.get("framework"),
1285	            start_command, [s.get("name") for s in services],
1286	            uses_doppler, runtime.get("health_check_path"),
1287	        )
1288	
1289	    def _write_preview_script(
1290	        self, script_lines: list[str], port: int, framework: str | None,
1291	        start_command: str, service_names: list[str],
1292	        uses_doppler: bool, health_check: str | None,
1293	    ) -> bool:
1294	        """Write the preview script and metadata."""
1295	        script_content = "\n".join(script_lines) + "\n"
1296	        home_dir = Path.home()
1297	        script_path = home_dir / "preview-start.sh"
1298	
1299	        try:
1300	            script_path.write_text(script_content, encoding="utf-8")
1301	            script_path.chmod(0o755)
1302	            logger.info(f"Preview script written to {script_path}")
1303	        except Exception as e:
1304	            logger.error(f"Failed to write preview script: {e}")
1305	            return False
1306	
1307	        metadata = {
1308	            "port": port,
1309	            "framework": framework,
1310	            "start_command": start_command,
1311	            "services": service_names,
1312	            "uses_doppler": uses_doppler,
1313	            "health_check": health_check,
1314	            "generated_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
1315	        }
1316	
1317	        metadata_path = self.dirigent_dir / "PREVIEW_META.json"
1318	        try:
1319	            with open(metadata_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
1320	                json.dump(metadata, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
1321	            logger.info(f"Preview metadata written to {metadata_path}")
1322	        except Exception as e:
1323	            logger.warning(f"Failed to write preview metadata: {e}")
1324	
1325	        return True

1328	def create_executor(

1331	    model: str = "", effort: str = "",

1336	        repo_path, spec_path, dry_run, use_proteus, model, effort,
1337	        portal_url, execution_id, reporter_token,
